fulda.title: Hochschule Fulda
fulda.description: Hochschule Fulda is a vocational university in Fulda, Germany. It offers a wide range of degree programs that teach science and technology.

emag.title: EMAG GmbH & Co. KG
emag.description: EMAG is a leading manufacturer of machine tools for metal processing. The company focuses on innovative technologies and digital solutions for production.

lvm.title: LVM Insurance Group
lvm.description: LVM Insurance is a prominent insurance group in Germany, known for its innovation and efficiency efforts. They manage an extensive network of over 2000 application instances in their operations.
